rows.label: qev095401_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, are you free to chat?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev095401_SEL0011
rows.name: Stay and chat with Stella for a while.

rows.label: qev095401_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev095401_SEL0021
rows.name: Explain that you are busy right now.

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0002
rows.name:
All right, no problem. Drop by when
your schedule opens up though, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have some important
chitchat to toss your way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0004
rows.name:
NLA's pretty peaceful, yeah? Even with
all the xenos thrown into the mix.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I mean, you remember what it was like on
Earth? It's like there was no end to the
conflicts. War was just...everywhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0006
rows.name:
And not just between nations, but across
race lines, tribal lines, you name it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Compared to that, humanity's made
real progress, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev095401_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and say that humans are maturing.

rows.label: qev095401_JNK0040
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev095401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Point out that humans are
still fighting xenoforms.

rows.label: qev095401_JNK0050
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev095401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Stella what she is getting at.

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Sadly, there are some who are
still stuck in the past.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0009
rows.name: Here, take a look at this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0010
rows.name: Oh, absolutely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Which actually brings me to my
point. Here, take a look at this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll stop beating around the
bush. Here's the deal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0013
rows.name:
It turns out that Director General
Chausson has a very hush-hush mission
that I think you're perfect for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0014
rows.name:
You know how the Bias working for the
Growth come from the Cavern Clan, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0015
rows.name:
They're a different tribe than the Tree Clan guys here
in the city. Those Bias you can at least talk to, but
the Cavern Clan are a real bloodthirsty bunch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Anyway, turns out that the director
general is interested in the Cavern
Clan's tech. Veeeery interested.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Specifically, he wants to know how
they're building all these strongholds
in areas overrun with indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0018
rows.name:
I need you to head to one of those sites
and investigate. Oh, and if necessary,
you're clear to terminate any resistance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0019
rows.name: Good luck out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0028
rows.name:
A lot of BLADEs have lost their
lives to those Cavern Clan Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0029
rows.name:
So be careful! And if you decide
it's getting too hairy at any point
during your investigation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well then, I'll trust you to take
appropriate action. Good luck![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0020
rows.name: Welcome back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I don't think anyone expected
things to go quite like they did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Even the director general was
speechless, and that never happens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0023
rows.name:
But he's approved the Cavern
Clan's request for asylum.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0024
rows.name:
He said he's eager to hear
what they can tell us about
both the Growth and the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'm sure things will be a bit difficult
for them with the Tree Clan here, but
them's the breaks, I guess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0026
rows.name:
They should still be able to
find a better life in NLA than
they'd have with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I hope your decision was the right
one—for the city AND for those Bias.
But I guess only time will tell.[ST:wait ]
